headline: Trump 🍊🔥 & Iran 💥⛽ SLING MISSILES 🚀 while Ceasefire CRASHES 💥😤
text:
US 🍔🦅 just dropped HELLFIRE 🔥✈️ on a BOTSWANA-FLAGGED tanker 🚢🇧🇼 headed to Iran’s oil party 🛢️🍾 at Kharg Island 🏝️⛽! Crew ghosted warnings for 24 hrs so Centcom said BYE BYE ENGINE ROOM 💥😩! Six ships already DISABLED 🛑 and 122 turned around since the Strait of Hormuz BLOCKADE 🚧🌊 kicked off April 13! Strait drama got the IRGC salty 🧂😡 yelling 'Mess with Hormuz, pay HEAVY PRICE 💸😤'!

Meanwhile Tehran fired BALLISTIC BOOM BOOMS 💣🚀 at Kuwait 🇰🇼 and Bahrain 🇧🇭 but US and Bahrain air defense said NOT TODAY 🛡️❌! Missiles either broke apart mid-flight ✈️💨 or got SWATTED like flies 🪰🔫! Iran claims it nailed US bases and choppers in some 'regional country' 🌍😏 but Centcom clapped back with self-defense strikes on Qeshm Island 🏝️🎯, blowing up an IRGC ground control station 📡💥 and three attack drones mid-air 🛩️🔥 headed for innocent merchant mariners 🚢🧍‍♂️!

Ceasefire talks went full BRICK WALL 🧱❌ this weekend, no deal in sight! Trump 🍊👑 told haters to 'SIT BACK AND CHILL' 🛋️😎 cuz Iran 'wants a DEAL and it'll be a GOOD ONE for USA' 🇺🇸💰! But sources say he’s editing the fine print ✍️📝: Strait access, uranium removal ☢️🚫, and restarting nuke talks! Iran’s Baghaei called BS 🐂💩 saying Washington keeps moving the goalposts 🏈🔄!

Marco Rubio 💼🇺🇸 told Congress 'NO FREE SANCTIONS 🍔🚫 – relief only if nukes get checked!' War’s supposedly 'OVER' but lawmakers are still grilling like it’s BBQ season 🍖🔥! Everyone’s slinging missiles, memes, and mixed signals while the world holds its breath 😰🌍!
